key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating cash flow $174.4M minus normalized capital spending $130.0M [Assumption: $49M above mid-cycle maintenance for Taiwan datacenter capacity build], divided by 60.2M FY2025 diluted shares; filing OCF and capex from 10-K FY2025
Data center mix rises; CATV upgrade cycle normalizes; capex falls toward maintenance after Taiwan build

open_questions: Confirm live price before sizing (equity offerings moved share count to ~76M diluted).
Validate normalized capital spending assumption versus Taiwan lease disclosures in Q1 2026 10-Q.
Review Amazon warrant economics and future contra-revenue impact.
No approved third-party sources indexed; re-run scan when Substacks or fund letters added.
thesis: Applied Optoelectronics designs and manufactures fiber-optic networking products for internet data centers, cable television, telecom, and fiber-to-the-home markets. **[Fact]** The company is vertically integrated: it fabricates laser chips in Sugar Land, Texas, and assembles transceivers and equipment in Taiwan and China. **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue was **$455.7 million** (+83% versus FY2024); gross profit **$136.9 million** (30.0% margin). **[Fact]** End markets in FY2025 were data center **43%**, CATV **54%**, telecom **3%**, and FTTH **<1%** of revenue. **[Fact]** The company employed **4,691** people at year-end 2025, mostly in China and Taiwan manufacturing.
why_market_wrong: **Predictive attribute:** complexity discount (small-cap optical supplier with 95% revenue from five customers, heavy China/Taiwan manufacturing, and episodic equity raises).
